mainText:
Welcome to Bank of Entitlement, where your financial dreams become our priority! "Because you deserve it all, and then some!"

Visit Bank of Entitlement dot com for more.

ENTITLEMENT STORY: Let me tell you about the time I demanded a first-class upgrade on a flight to Paris. So there I was, sitting in my perfectly fine business class seat, sipping on champagne and feeling like the king of the world. But then I noticed a few rows ahead, there it was-the elusive first-class cabin. Suddenly, I felt a sense of entitlement wash over me. Why should I, Hot Josh, have to sit just a few feet away from ultimate luxury? No, I deserved to be among the elite, surrounded by opulence and exclusivity.Without a second thought, I marched up to the flight attendant and demanded to be upgraded to first class immediately. When she hesitated and explained that there were no available seats, I unleashed a tirade of entitlement so powerful that passengers in economy could hear my demands. I made it clear that I would not tolerate anything less than the best, and that meant a first-class seat for me, no matter the cost.After what seemed like an eternity of me making a scene, the flight attendant finally relented and magically found a way to accommodate my request. As I settled into my plush first-class seat, savoring the caviar and enjoying the personalized service, I knew that my entitled outburst had been completely justified. After all, why settle for less when you can demand the best?
